def readinput():
    n=int(input())
    l=[]
    r=[]
    for i in range(n):
        a,b=map(int,input().split())
        l.append(a)
        r.append(b)
    return n,l,r
def main(n,l,r):
    l.sort()
    r.sort()
    j=0
    count=0
    for i in range(n):
        if l[i]<r[j]:
            count+=1
        else:
            j+=1
    return count
def printans(ans):
    print(ans)
if __name__=='__main__':
    n,l,r=readinput()
    ans=main(n,l,r)
    printans(ans)
